title: tarenna eketensis
intro: Tarenna eketensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Nigeria. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tarenna eketensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation, and fight off infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine in its native region.
